attachments.fallback: How to Transfer Gmail to Hotmail? - @youngme (Young)
attachments.text:
Here is the manual technique to move Gmail Emails to Hotmail (Outlook)

1. Sign in to Your Hotmail (Outlook)

Go to <https://outlook.live.com|https://outlook.live.com>

Log in with your Hotmail or Outlook email.

2. Open Settings

Click the setting icon in the top right corner.

Scroll down and click “View all Outlook settings.”

3. Go to Email Sync Settings

On the left side, click Mail, then choose Sync email.

attachments.fallback: How to Remove Duplicates From OneDrive? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: If you are searching for a method to remove duplicates from OneDrive, then you can try the <https://www.sysinfotools.com/onedrive-duplicate-file-finder.php|SysInfo OneDrive Duplicate File Finder>. This tool helps you efficiently remove duplicate documents, photos, videos, and audio files from your OneDrive. It automatically scans all folders to identify and skip similar data items. You have two advanced options for handling duplicates: Delete Permanently or Move…
